releaseNotes: We’ve buffed out the rough spots, squashed bugs, and made things smoother than a first-date conversation. Update now for a seamless Smitten experience!
description:
Meet Smitten, the dating app that makes meeting people actually fun.

Dating shouldn’t feel like a job.
Conversations shouldn’t feel scripted.
And getting to know someone should feel exciting again.

That’s where Smitten comes in.

We bring personality, humor, and spontaneity back to dating through playful profile moments, interactive games, and better ways to discover people who match your vibe.

“We’re not like other dating apps.”

Here’s why…

1. Find people who match your vibe.

Instead of endlessly swiping, tell us the kind of energy you’re looking for and explore people who fit your preferences.

For example:
• “Outdoorsy and adventurous”
• “Confident and ambitious”
• “Coffee lover with a great sense of humor”
• “Creative, social, and spontaneous”

2. Explore personality-first profiles.

Discover people through their humor, opinions, quirks, highlights, and unique perspective. Smitten helps you connect beyond just photos.

3. Make dating feel more natural.

Smitten is designed to help conversations flow more easily through interactive prompts, games, and shared experiences that break the ice naturally.

4. Actually get to know people.

Smitten profiles include personality games, fun prompts, live photo moments, and conversation starters that help people show who they really are.

5. No more dead-end chats.

Matches expire after 10 days if nobody messages, encouraging real conversations and helping reduce ghosting. Smitten also adds game results directly into chats to make starting conversations easier.

What if dating felt more like playing a game?

Guessary

Guess fun facts about other people and discover surprising details about their personality. A fun, effortless icebreaker.

Lie Detector

Two truths and a lie — you know the game. Spot the lie, challenge each other, and kick off the conversation.

Wavy

Rate hot takes on a slider, then compare answers to see whether you instantly click or lovingly disagree.

Unlock Smitten Premium

Upgrade your experience with premium features:
• See who likes you
• Undo accidental likes
• Unlimited likes
• Read receipts
• Incognito mode for more privacy

It’s a wild world out there, so we’ve added tools to help keep dating comfortable and safe:
• Pause your profile anytime
• Control your visibility
• Connect at your own pace

Just one final piece of advice:
Don’t settle for boring dating apps.

Try Smitten.

The app is free to use. Optional premium features are available. Terms apply:
https://www.websitepolicies.com/policies/view/d4cOtUMF
